headlines.headline: Demaryius Thomas' 'I scored a touchdown' story: SB XLVIII
headlines.description: This "I scored a touchdown" story told by Katina Smith, mother of the late Demaryius Thomas, is focused on his touchdown for the Broncos in Super Bowl XLVIII.

headlines.headline: Ex-Jet Wint to fight for UFC deal on Dana White's Contender Series
headlines.description: Former NFL linebacker Anthony Wint, who played briefly for the New York Jets in 2018, will fight in Dana White's Contender Series later this year in an effort to land a UFC contract.

headlines.headline: Jets QB Klubnik unshaken by fall in draft: 'I'm a winner'
headlines.description: Jets rookie QB Cade Klubnik said he's still "a winner" despite a difficult final season at Clemson that saw his draft stock fall.

headlines.description: The Carolina Hurricanes are the new favorites to win the 2026 Stanley Cup.

headlines.headline: Avalanche replace Wedgewood with Blackwood in Game 3 loss
headlines.description: Adversity has hit the Avalanche, who suffered their first loss of the postseason and pulled starting goaltender Scott Wedgewood after he allowed a third goal on 12 shots in 24:23 against Minnesota.

headlines.headline: Jesper Wallstedt makes most of 2nd chance, leads Wild to win
headlines.description: Jesper Wallstedt, back in net as the starter after being benched for Game 2, made 34 saves as the Wild handled the  Avalanche 5-1 in Game 3 of the Western Conference semifinals, giving Minnesota its first victory of the series.
